management.usernameTaken: A user with that username already exists
management.emailTaken: A user with that email already exists
management.groupNameTaken: A group with that name already exists

strategy.title: Strategy
strategy.subtitle: Choose how to select among multiple enabled global configs, and how failures are handled.
strategy.multiModelNote: When multiple global configs are enabled (by order), the following applies:
strategy.failureBehaviorFirst: First: Always use the first active config (lowest order). If that call fails, the request fails immediately — no automatic fallback to the next config.
strategy.failureBehaviorRoundRobin: Round-robin: Each new request uses the next config in order. If a call fails, that request fails; the next request will use the next config in the rotation.

config.title: Configs
config.subtitle: Global and user-level model settings
config.perUserDesc: User-specific configs override global. List below.
config.noUsersHint: No users. Cannot add per-user config.
config.testPromptPlaceholder: Enter a prompt to send to the model…
config.streamingParamHint: Request param stream: use SSE stream for incremental response.
config.noGlobalConfigs: No global configs. Add one below.

errors.invalid_api_key: Invalid or expired API key. Please check and try again.
errors.auth_failed: Authentication failed. Please check API key or account permissions.
errors.rate_limit: Rate limit or quota exceeded. Please try again later.
errors.not_found: Model or endpoint not found. Please check model name and API base URL.
errors.timeout: Connection timed out. Please check network and API base URL.
errors.network_error: Cannot reach the service. Please check API base URL and network.
errors.permission_denied: Access denied. Please check API key and account permissions.
errors.unknown: Connection test failed. Please check your configuration and try again.

dataSettings.title: Scheduled Tasks
dataSettings.subtitle: Data retention, cleanup and aggregation schedules for LLM usage.
dataSettings.retentionDesc: Keep usage and series records for this many days; older data is deleted by the cleanup task.
dataSettings.cleanupDesc: Run scheduled cleanup of old LLM usage and series data.
dataSettings.aggregationCrontabDesc: One task aggregates hour, day and month series each run.
dataSettings.crontabHelp: 5 fields: minute hour day month weekday

config.title: Threadline Model Settings
config.subtitle: Bind separate LLMs for multimodal image understanding and text processing, and choose the failure notification channel.
config.legacyHint: The old single-model binding is automatically mirrored to both image and text models.
config.currentBindingHint: Saving here changes the LLMs used by the Threadline workflow.
config.imageModelDesc: Used for direct multimodal understanding of image attachments and image intent.
config.textModelDesc: Used for email body processing, summaries, and metadata extraction.
config.notificationChannelDesc: Used by Threadline to send workflow and task failure alerts through the configured webhook channel.
config.noNotificationChannels: No active webhook channels found. Create one in Notification Channels first.
config.selectionRequired: Please choose both image and text models

periodicTasks.title: Scheduled Task Settings
periodicTasks.subtitle: Manage the enabled state and Crontab of Threadline scheduled tasks.
periodicTasks.crontabHint: Use a standard 5-field crontab expression, for example 0 2 * * *.
periodicTasks.autoSaveHint: Enable/disable switches save immediately; edit Crontab and click the bottom save button.
periodicTasks.footerHint: Switches auto-save, while Crontab changes need the bottom save button.
periodicTasks.crontabHelp: Five fields: minute hour day month weekday
periodicTasks.crontabRequired: Please enter a Crontab for every task.

taskTimeout.title: Task timeout checker
taskTimeout.description: Mark timed-out task executions as failed.

meteringCleanup.title: Usage data cleanup
meteringCleanup.description: Delete expired LLM usage and series data.

meteringAggregate.title: Usage data aggregation
meteringAggregate.description: Aggregate hourly, daily and monthly series in one run.

emailFetch.title: Email fetch scheduler
emailFetch.description: Dispatch email fetch jobs on a fixed schedule.

resetStuckEmails.title: Stuck email reset
resetStuckEmails.description: Reset emails that stay stuck for too long.

harakaCleanup.title: Haraka cleanup
harakaCleanup.description: Clean up Haraka mail files and old attachments.

billingRenewCredits.title: Renew expired credits
billingRenewCredits.description: Renew credits for subscriptions that have expired.

billingDowngrade.title: Subscription downgrade
billingDowngrade.description: Downgrade failed paid subscriptions on schedule.

list.title: Task List
list.subtitle: View and filter task execution records
list.searchPlaceholder: Search by task name or module...

stats.title: Task Statistics
stats.subtitle: Execution stats by status, module and task type
stats.seriesSubtitle: Task count over time by bucket
stats.chartByTaskNameSubtitle: Top task types by total count

settings.title: Task Settings
settings.subtitle: Configurable task timeout and retention
settings.moduleConfigSubtitle: Set default rules and parameters for core functions.
settings.timeoutDesc: Tasks running longer than the configured minutes are marked as failed (by scheduled job).
settings.retentionDesc: The number of days completed/failed records are kept before cleanup.
settings.cleanupDesc: Automatically clean up old execution records, runs daily by default.
settings.markTimeoutDesc: Regularly check and mark tasks that exceed the time limit.
settings.crontabHelp: 5 fields: minute hour day month weekday, e.g. 0 2 * * *
settings.configNote: Settings below are configurable; save to apply.

stats.title: Send Statistics
stats.subtitle: Monitor send trends, success rate and channel distribution
stats.seriesSubtitle: Send volume by hour / day / month

records.title: Send Records
records.subtitle: Notification send records with filters and pagination

channels.title: Notification Channels
channels.subtitle: Manage notification channels (Webhook and email SMTP); add multiple and set default.
channels.noChannels: No channels yet. Click Add Channel to create one.
channels.name: Name
channels.orderDesc: The active channel with the smallest order value is used for sending; smaller value = higher priority, same value uses creation time.
channels.messagePrefixDesc: Prepended to the message body when sending; some platforms require a source identifier.
channels.signSecretPlaceholder: Optional; required when Feishu bot has signature verification enabled
channels.signSecretDesc: When Feishu custom bot has signature verification enabled, paste the secret here; requests will be signed automatically.
channels.signSecretEditHint: Leave blank when editing to keep current secret
channels.languageDesc: Select the language for notification messages (e.g. Feishu/WeCom).
channels.mergeEnabledDesc: Merge multiple notifications with the same key within the time window.
channels.mergeWindowMinutesDesc: 0 = no merge; use with Enable merge when > 0.
channels.editSaveHint: You can save directly if nothing was changed; after changing config, validate first then save.
channels.smtpPasswordEditHint: Leave blank when editing to keep current password
channels.fromNameDesc: Display name shown to recipients; if empty, only the email address is shown.
channels.subjectPrefixDesc: Prepended to the email subject when sending, to identify the source.
channels.validateEmailDialogDesc: Enter the recipient email to receive a test message, or leave empty to only test SMTP connection.
channels.testRecipientEmailDesc: Optional. If filled, a test email will be sent to this address; otherwise only SMTP connection is tested.
channels.silenceWindowMinutesDesc: Same alert will not be sent again within this period (only once); 0 means no silence.
channels.isActiveDesc: When off, this channel will not be used for sending.
channels.setDefaultDesc: Use this channel when no channel is specified.

settings.title: Notification Settings
settings.subtitle: Notification module schedule and cleanup config (admin)
settings.retentionDesc: Keep notification records for this many days; cleanup task deletes older ones.
settings.cleanupDesc: Run cleanup at the cron schedule below to remove expired records.
settings.crontabHelp: Five-field cron: minute hour day month weekday, e.g. 0 2 * * * = daily at 02:00.

config.title: Notification Config
config.subtitle: Webhook and notification channel config (admin)
config.webhookConfigDesc: Configure Feishu, WeCom, etc. webhooks for system notifications.
